mentions.note: Up $10 today on Snowflake momentum shift; other stocks shining brighter recently. Cramer retains faith in CEO Alex Karp; insider selling concern noted by caller but dismissed as temporary eclipse.
Down 20% YTD; fundamentally amazing company but stock got ahead of itself; let it run if playing with house money; long-term conviction intact despite valuation concerns.

Reported terrific quarter; only name in IGV ETF top 10 that avoided obliteration; data intelligence supplier benefiting from AI theme.
Expecting terrific quarter; stock will reignite; CEO Alex Karp can come back from recent underperformance; up significantly over past two years.
Not momentum play but operational AI transformation story. When you hire them, business improves. Cramer not backing away despite 130→250→150 volatility; great opportunity to buy.
